--- department: Engineering sensitivity: confidential version: 2.1 --- # Deploying New Software Build 1. Merge code to main branch. 2. Run CI/CD pipeline. 3. Notify QA for validation. 4. Deploy to production after approval.

# Engineering Department Onboarding Welcome to Engineering! 1. Complete your technical setup (laptop, IDE, VPN). 2. Review engineering SOPs and code standards. 3. Meet your team lead and schedule onboarding sessions. 4. Access project repositories and documentation. 5. Attend Engineering orientation meeting. For questions, contact your team lead or HR.

# HR Department Onboarding Welcome to HR! 1. Review HR policies and compliance guidelines. 2. Complete HRIS system training. 3. Meet with HR manager for orientation. 4. Access benefits and payroll documentation. 5. Attend HR onboarding session. For questions, contact your HR manager.

--- department: HR sensitivity: internal version: 1.0 --- # Vacation Policy All full-time employees are entitled to 15 days of paid vacation per year. Requests must be submitted via the HR portal at least 2 weeks in advance.

# Technology Department Onboarding Welcome to Technology! 1. Complete your technical setup (laptop, IDE, VPN). 2. Review technology SOPs and code standards. 3. Meet your team lead and schedule onboarding sessions. 4. Access project repositories and documentation. 5. Attend Technology orientation meeting. For questions, contact your team lead or HR.
